subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #037 The Connection between God and His Manifestations
subcodes.first_line: Know that the reality of the Divinity and the nature of the divine Essence is ineffable sanctity and absolute holiness
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که حقیقت الوهیت و کنه ذات احدیت تنزیه صرف و تقدیس بحت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @differences between the Manifestations; station of distinction, @names and attributes of God, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @Manifestation of God the only route to knowledge of God
